notFound.title: 404 Not Found
notFound.description: Could not find the requested page.

t0.content1: This is your campaigns page, where you can manage your campaigns.
t0.content2: These are your campaigns, currently you have none.
t0.content3: Here you can create a new campaign.
t0.content4: Alternatively you can join an existing campaign by requesting an invite link from the DM.
t0.content5: Lastly, you can toggle dark mode here. Enjoy!

t1.content1: Building your first campaign? Don't worry, it's incredibly easy!
t1.content2: First, you can invite people to your campaign. Click here to get the invite link.
t1.content3: People who have joined your campaign can be managed here.
t1.content4: Click here to update your campaign details.
t1.content5: Now start by creating a new character. You can create as many as you like!

t2.content1: This is one of your characters. Check out what you can do with it!
t2.content2: Visit your character dashboard to view and manage your character's inventory, stats, and more.
t2.content3: Click here to update your character details.
t2.content4: Click here to delete your character.
t2.content5: Here you can duplicate or move your character to another campaign.
t2.content6: Now that you have one or more characters, you can view your party dashboard to see all your characters in one place.
